title: Pre-op anticoagulation documentation

red_flags.text: Supports documenting anticoagulant use and clinician-assessed thrombotic and bleeding risk context without mapping hold, continue, bridge, medicine, or dose instructions.
red_flags.rationale: The official ACC summary supports documenting therapeutic anticoagulation and clinician-assessed thrombotic and bleeding risk context, but not hold, continue, bridge, or dose instructions.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Supports documenting anticoagulant use and clinician-assessed thrombotic and bleeding risk context without mapping hold, continue, bridge, medicine, or dose instructions.

source.title: 2024 AHA/ACC Perioperative CV Management Guideline: Key Points

exact_section.heading: Key point 6 - therapeutic anticoagulation and individualized thrombotic or bleeding risk

investigations.text: Supports review of medical, anesthesia, medicine, investigation, and consultation records relevant to anesthesia.
investigations.rationale: The ASA standard supports documenting review of current medical therapy and relevant records during preanesthesia assessment.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports review of medical, anesthesia, medicine, investigation, and consultation records relevant to anesthesia.

exact_section.heading: Review of the available medical record

source_limitations: Medicine, indication, dose, last dose, renal function, bleeding history, thrombotic risk, procedure risk, laboratory status, hold or continue decision, bridging, restart, regional anesthesia, and follow-up remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
